questions.question: Given a collection of cities, which option removes the first city?
questions.explanation: The $pop() operator removes the first item from an array. In this case, it removes the first city.

questions.question: What does the $unset() operator do in the context of removing the first city?
options: A) Removes the first item from an array
B) Removes a field from a document
D) Removes the last item from an array
questions.explanation: The $unset() operator removes a field from a document, not an item from an array.

questions.question: Which option uses the $sort() operator to remove the first city?
questions.explanation: The $sort() operator sorts documents in an array, it does not remove items.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the $pull() operator in the context of removing the first city?
options: A) Removes a field from a document
B) Removes the first item from an array
questions.explanation: $pull() removes duplicate documents based on an array field, it does not remove the first item.

questions.question: $pull() is used to remove which of the following?
options: B) The last item from an array
questions.explanation: $pull() removes the first duplicate document, not the first city.
